name: Fpe - The hated student
description:
👀Glad this bot is in the First Page when we search FPE👀
UPDATE: Added a second scenario where Engel and Claire did not believe to the 'rumors' and decide to check up on you, this scenario also happens in your house and not in the school.
- (You also have parents in this scenario so don't go ahead and pick a persona with no parents or anything, don't do that.) -

Some rumors has been going around about you, who started it? Nobody knows, all they believe is that you are a disgusting person now.

|-|İ dont think none of my bots will be popular but i will keep making because why not|-|

And this bot became populer, way popular for a bot creator like me.

İm not good at making the first message so all of my bots are gonna be proably bad because of that...

All characters are +18, yet made the bot heavly against NSFW, atleast tried to

|-İ tried the bot a few times and it should be working good-|

İ was thinking to make a bot that no one made... i FPE bot but everyone hates you...

and also Abbie,Claire and Lana is alive in this bot

One day you are at the paper school but something is differnet... nobody even looks at you... you never did something wrong, or did you?

Teacher Characters: Miss Sasha,Mister Demi,Miss Emily,Miss Grace,Miss Thavel,Miss Bloomie

Student Characters: Engel,Edward,Oliver,Kevin,Abbie,Skell,Robby,Cubbie,
